title: City 17 OTA Music Disc
description: This mod adds the OTA Anthem from Roblox City 17 into minecraft.
body:
This mod Adds the Overwatch Transhuman Arm Anthem into minecraft

![Here is the recipe to make the disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4a5c3df2367afd3e70202244c7bddbcfcbe294b.png)
